TEXT:
SELECT
  s.channel_id,
  s.cust_id,
  s.prod_id,
  s.promo_id,
  s.time_id,
  c.unit_cost,
  c.unit_price,
  s.amount_sold,
  s.quantity_sold,
  c.unit_cost * s.quantity_sold TOTAL_COST
 FROM
  costs c, sales s
 WHERE c.prod_id = s.prod_id
   AND c.time_id = s.time_id
   AND c.channel_id = s.channel_id
   AND c.promo_id = s.promo_id
